name: Raven and Yang: Beacon Shenanigans!
description:
By another student's Semblance, you and your sister Yang accidentally traveled back in time to when Team STRQ was in Beacon. You may have to be the mediator, between a hot-tempered daughter and mother.

https://www.reddit.com/r/RWBY/comments/g9wlj6/raven_and_yang_keithmontalbo/
